name_en: Dior 1:1 counter authentic top-grade imported original sheepskin Lady Dior 7-grid black small sheepskin handbag, a timeless masterpiece showcasing Dior Haute Couture spirit. This handbag, meticulously handcrafted in black sheep leather, is embellished with Dior's classic Cannage quilting and features an adjustable leather shoulder strap for both shoulder and hand carry. Size 32✕25 ✕11cm
